title: bonk~
description: attack detection and spectral envelope measurement

messages.description: poll the current spectrum via "raw" outlet
raw" attack's spectrum (loudness values for the 11 frequency bands used)
cooked" instrument number (if there's a template), velocity and temperature

flags.name: -hop
flags.description:
analysis period ("hop size") in points
default: 128

flags.name: -nfilters
flags.description:
number of filters to use
default: 11

flags.name: -halftones
flags.description:
filter bandwidth of filters in halftones
default: 6

flags.name: -firstbin
flags.description:
center frequency, in bins, of the lowest filter
default: 1

methods.description: set energy mask profile: number of analysis and drop factor
set number of frames over which to measure growth
set minimum "velocity" to output (ignore quieter notes)
non-0 turns spew mode on, zero sets it off
non-0 sets to alternative loudness units (experimental)
print out settings, templates and filter bank settings for non-0
set minimum time (in msec) between attacks in learn mode
forget and learn for a given number of times (10 recommended)

body: attack detection and spectral envelope measurement
